case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. GERMAN JOEL MORENO VIVAS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-07-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 - SERVED SEP-05-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VIVAS, GERMAN JOEL MORENO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VIVAS, GERMAN JOEL MORENO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIVAS, GERMAN JOEL MORENO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
